question: The line chart shows site visits from 2018 to 2022. Which of the following statements is supported by the chart?

options.A: Site visits increased every year from 2018 through 2022.
options.B: Visits in 2021 and 2022 are exactly the same.
options.C: 2021 has the highest number of visits.
options.D: None of the above statements is supported by the chart.

explanation: The visible y-range is set below the maximum value, so the top bar is truncated and looks identical.
